setting: Late at night, Alex calls his girlfriend, Chloe, feeling anxious and overwhelmed.
lyrics:
Ooh
Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah
Ooh

Hello
Are you awake right now?
God, I just need to hear the sound of you
Please calm me down
And I know that it's selfish, but
You are the only thing that's
Ever made sense to me, I
I don't wanna do this
I don't know how to do this without you

Cling to your side, voices at night
Cover my eyes, I'm terrified

No in between, a face on a screen
Ain't an adequate replacement for your being with me (Yeah-yeah)

Too much time in the limelight
Gimme your all on the landline
Want it so bad but I won't lie
And it just gets worse in the nighttime
Never stays for long (Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah)
And she's gone in the morning (Ooh)

When you come home
I just got over bein' less of you
When you leave me, I'm in pieces
Maybe it's better if we cut it loose

Tell me how your day was
No, I'm not okay

I don't know, I don't know, I don't know
I don't know, I don't know, I don't know
Time never moved so slow
Bed time, hit your phone up
Tell me where to go, where to go
Tell me where to go, where to go-oh-oh

もしもし

ねえ、君の声が聞きたいだけなんだ
どうか落ち着かせて
分かってる、身勝手なのは
だけど君だけが
僕にとって全てだったんだ
もうこんなこと嫌だ
君がいないなんてどうすればいい？

君の側にしがみついて
夜が声を上げる
目を閉じても怖いんだ

画面越しの君の顔じゃ
僕のそばにいる君の代わりにはなれない (Yeah-yeah)

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: }} I know it's late, but I just needed to hear from you.
sentences.displayHtml: }} I know it's late, but I just needed to hear from you.

conversation.japanese: もしもし？今起きてる？遅いのは分かってるんだけど、君の声が聞きたくて。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You sound a little upset, Alex.
sentences.displayHtml: You sound a little upset, Alex.

conversation.japanese: もしもし。うん、起きてるよ。どうしたの？アレックス、ちょっと元気がないみたいだけど。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Things just feel a lot worse in the nighttime, and I'm a little terrified.
sentences.displayHtml: Things just feel a lot worse in the nighttime, and I'm a little terrified.

conversation.japanese: ただ…すごく参ってるんだ。夜になると余計にひどくなるし、ちょっと怯えてるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I know a face on a screen isn't an adequate replacement for me being with you.
sentences.displayHtml: I know a face on a screen isn't an adequate replacement for me being with you.

conversation.japanese: あら、大丈夫？側にいられたらよかったのに。画面越しの顔じゃ、私が一緒にいることの十分な代わりにはならないって分かってる。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: You're the only thing that's ever made sense to me.
sentences.displayHtml: You're the only thing that's ever made sense to me.

sentences.text: I don't know how to do this without you.
sentences.displayHtml: I don't know how to do this without you.

conversation.japanese: うん、そうなんだ。君は僕にとって唯一意味のある存在なんだ。ただ…君なしでどうすればいいか分からないよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Just tell me everything, and I'll calm you down.
sentences.displayHtml: Just tell me everything, and I'll calm you down.

conversation.japanese: 大丈夫だよ。深呼吸して。私がそばにいるから。全部話してごらん、落ち着かせてあげる。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Right now, it feels like time never moved so slow.
sentences.displayHtml: Right now, it feels like time never moved so slow.

sentences.text: I just need you to tell me where to go, what to do.
sentences.displayHtml: I just need you to tell me where to go, what to do.

conversation.japanese: 今、時間がこんなにもゆっくり進むことなんてなかったって感じるよ。ただ君にどこに行けばいいか、何をすればいいか教えてほしいんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Okay, let's start with this: just talk to me, stay on the phone.
sentences.displayHtml: Okay, let's start with this: just talk to me, stay on the phone.

conversation.japanese: 分かった。じゃあ、まずはこうしよう：私と話して、電話を切らないで。一緒に解決策を見つけよう。
